title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Chatbase is an AI platform that founder Yasser Elsaid bootstrapped to $10M ARR without external funding. The founder achieved $1M ARR in 117 days and shares strategies for growth including product-led growth, SEO, warm outbound, and churn reduction.
